title: Define a Custom Resource Definition
description: Write a CRD for a 'CacheCluster' custom resource with OpenAPI v3 schema validation.
starterCode:
# Write a CRD for 'CacheCluster' that:
# 1. apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1, kind: CustomResourceDefinition
# 2. metadata.name: cacheclusters.caching.mycompany.com
# 3. spec.group: caching.mycompany.com
# 4. Version v1alpha1 (served: true, storage: true)
# 5. OpenAPI schema with spec properties:
#    - replicas: integer (minimum 1, maximum 10)
#    - image: string (required)
#    - memoryGb: number (required)
# 6. scope: Namespaced
# 7. names: plural=cacheclusters, singular=cachecluster, kind=CacheCluster, shortNames=[cc]

apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
solutionCode:
apiVersion: apiextensions.k8s.io/v1
kind: CustomResourceDefinition
metadata:
  name: cacheclusters.caching.mycompany.com
spec:
  group: caching.mycompany.com
  versions:
    - name: v1alpha1
      served: true
      storage: true
      schema:
        openAPIV3Schema:
          type: object
          properties:
            spec:
              type: object
              required: ["image", "memoryGb"]
              properties:
                replicas:
                  type: integer
                  minimum: 1
                  maximum: 10
                image:
                  type: string
                memoryGb:
                  type: number
  scope: Namespaced
  names:
    plural: cacheclusters
    singular: cachecluster
    kind: CacheCluster
    shortNames:
      - cc
hints: required fields go in the parent object's 'required' array, not inside properties

validationRules.errorMessage: YAML is invalid — check CRD spec indentation

simulatedOutput.success:
customresourcedefinition.apiextensions.k8s.io/cacheclusters.caching.mycompany.com created

CRD registered:
  Group: caching.mycompany.com
  Version: v1alpha1
  Kind: CacheCluster (cc)
  Scope: Namespaced
  Schema validation: enabled (replicas, image, memoryGb)

You can now create resources:
  kubectl apply -f cachecluster.yaml
simulatedOutput.failure: CRD validation failed. Check apiVersion (apiextensions.k8s.io/v1), metadata.name, group, versions, OpenAPI schema, and names.
